name: HashMap Patterns — Grouping, Frequency, Sliding Window

metadata.career_relevance: Group Anagrams and Top K Frequent are the two most common medium HashMap problems at Flipkart/Amazon. Min Window Substring is a Google hard. Word Pattern bijection (two-way mapping) is a common gotcha question.

hook.what_you_will_build: Group Anagrams, Top K Frequent, Min Window, Word Pattern, Isomorphic Strings.

concept_explanation.patterns: Group Anagrams: sorted word as key. Top K: freq map + min-heap of size k. Min Window: required counter.

key_takeaways: Group Anagrams: sorted chars as key O(m log m); freq-encoded key O(m)
Top K Frequent: freq map + min-heap size k → O(n log k)
Word Pattern: two-way bijection needs TWO maps
Isomorphic: int[128] index trick (store i+1 to distinguish 'not set' from index 0)
Min Window: required counter, shrink when all satisfied
Brick Wall: count interior edge positions, answer = rows - max edges
reflection.next_topic_preview: Next: HashSet Applications — O(1) membership, dedup, union, intersection, cycle detection.
